meaning: n.(爱尔兰民俗中的)女妖精
examples: A banshee, before I go on, is an Irish myth.
BANSHEE RIDERS circle and swoop, darkening the sky above the grotto.
Mandy summoned her inner banshee, threw a lamp and some decent flatware.
She could be catatonic one day, or act out like a banshee on another.
When the Banshee was in place, it identified my Sampo as a plug-and-play monitor.
